items.name: CP2 scope baseline is approved before CP3
items.notes: User approved all seven CP2 decisions at 2026-07-02T09:59:41+08:00.

items.name: Architecture Gray Areas are recorded before HLD
items.notes: Five AGAs recorded: ML gate relation, metadata vs registry write, contract extension, label extensibility and fixture contract.

items.name: HLD covers problem, goals, options, recommendation, traceability, flows, failures, risks and tentative Story groups
items.notes: HLD recommends metadata-only ML contract extensions, ML-specific gate with shared four-state adapter and deterministic fixture validation.

items.name: Core ADR decisions include recommendation, alternatives, impact and rollback
items.notes: ADR-CR152-001..004 cover ML-specific gate adapter, metadata-only boundary, contract extension and fixture-only validation.

items.name: HLD extends existing contracts rather than rebuilding parallel ML contracts
items.notes: Contract delta table maps CR152 companions to ResearchDatasetSpec, LeakagePolicy, TrainingSnapshotSpec, ModelArtifactRef, StrategyAdmissionStatisticalGate and StrategyAdmissionPackage.

items.name: Metadata contract vs model registry write boundary is explicit
items.notes: Registry write/publish/promote/upload/sync/mutate/set_current and model/feature/label/prediction store writes remain not authorized.

items.name: No runtime, credential, lake, NAS, provider, QMT, broker, trading, external framework, catalog or registry authorization is granted
items.notes: All CP3 artifacts state design-only, static/fixture-only and no-registry-write boundaries.

pending_human_decisions.question: Approve ML-specific admission gate with CR151 four-state status and admission package adapter?
pending_human_decisions.recommended_option: Define MLAdmissionGateSummary and adapter that maps to PASS / FAIL / NEEDS_REVIEW / BLOCKED and records admission package linkage.

pending_human_decisions.question: Approve metadata-only model artifact boundary and keep model registry writes out of scope?
pending_human_decisions.recommended_option: Allow TrainingSnapshotSpec / ModelArtifactRef metadata contracts only; forbid registry write, publish, promote, upload, set_current, catalog pointer mutation and store writes.

pending_human_decisions.question: Approve extending/composing existing ResearchDatasetSpec, TrainingSnapshotSpec and ModelArtifactRef anchors instead of creating parallel ML contracts?
pending_human_decisions.recommended_option: Use companion objects or narrow extensions anchored to existing contracts; do not rebuild a parallel ML contract family.

pending_human_decisions.question: Approve deterministic fixture-only validation boundary for CP4/CP5 planning?
pending_human_decisions.recommended_option: Use deterministic local fixtures with explicit PIT, leakage, purged/embargo and artifact metadata cases; all forbidden operation counters remain zero.

cp4_attention_items.summary: Feature Design Matrix must be produced before CP5 and each Story must have lld_policy.required_level.
CP5 LLD must make active triple_barrier first-wave enforcement exact; recommended BLOCKED because the algorithm is not implemented.
If adapter implementation detail or contract delta field mapping needs architecture deepening, consider meta-se dispatch or explicit inline-fallback approval.
